metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugin marketplace by Charalampos Kyfonidis

plugins.name: agent-step-toolkit
plugins.description: Build agent-step LangGraph projects and tools: bootstrap a new project (runner library + streaming CLI + scaffold + the required local sandbox service per sandbox-contract.md), add domain tools (actions / executors / verifiers / controller hooks + invalidatesOnChange) with sandbox extensions per backend, port an existing project onto agent-step, including read-tool patterns (native paginated reads via `pageable`, LLM-authored data analysis over fetched data), channel-handoff actions with orchestrator/specialized agent roles, completed/abandon/off_topic handbacks, and library-coordinated off-topic delegation via agent-step 1.4.0 (the bootstrap scaffold ships the channel middleware wire/streaming contract), upgrade downstream projects' vendored runner library (/pull-library), and lay down the three-layer test methodology.

plugins.name: langgraph-plugin
plugins.description: Run and debug LangGraph.js conversations: /run-langgraph-conversation executes a single- or multi-turn test conversation against the local dev server and captures the thread; /follow-langgraph-conversation investigates any thread end-to-end (dev-server checkpoint history + optional LangSmith traces) and produces root-cause analysis. Discovers the server port and LangSmith credentials from the project's own config (langgraph.json, dev script, docker-compose, .env).
